utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Alright , you did it ! Do we have any fruit ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Man , hell of a two weeks , huh ? You know what , though ? I really feel like I learned something .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I really feel like I learned something .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Really ? So , you are gonna stick with this it is all for her thing ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: What , are you crazy ? When a blind man gets his sight back , does he walk around like this ?

emotion_cause.span: 4_you are gonna stick with this it is all for her thing ?
